song.title: Lord, I Lift Your Name On High
song.author: Rick Founds
song.copyright: 1989 Maranatha! Music (ASCAP)(Admin. by The Copyright Company)
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C D CDG Lord, I lift Your name on high. . C D CDG Lord, I love to sing Your praises. . C D CDG I'm so glad You’re in my life. . C D CDG I'm so glad You came to save us.
[C] . C D You came from heaven to earth, . C G To show the way, . C D From the earth to the cross, . C G My debt to pay, . C D From the cross to the grave, . Bm C From the grave to the sky. . D G Lord I lift Your name on high.
